title: National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2027

latestAction.text: Motion to reconsider laid on the table Agreed to without objection.

title: Protecting Childcare from Private Equity Act

latestAction.text: Referred to the Committee on Financial Services, and in addition to the Committee on Education and Workforce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

title: GET THE LEAD OUT Act of 2026

latestAction.text: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committees on Financial Services, and Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

title: Military Spouse Employment and Child Care Readiness Act

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Armed Services.

title: Expand the Behavioral Health Workforce Now Act

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
